title: Add W and N (more frequent letters)
description: W (top ring left) and N (right index home-bottom) — both very common
text: we now then when know own one win two news any easy why see
finger_focus: W (top, left ring), N (home-bottom, right index)

tips.text: W sits above S — left ring reaches up
N sits below J — right index drops down-left

tips.target: we now then when know own one
tips.hint: W (top, left ring), N (home-bottom, right index)

tips.text: Words become real: we, when, now, one, two

tips.target: win two news any easy why see
tips.hint: W (top, left ring), N (home-bottom, right index)

character_tips.anna: W and N are mega-frequent. Words "we", "when", "now" — almost a conversation already.
character_tips.maxim: N is the most common consonant. With it, any English text becomes possible.
character_tips.knopych: Doubling the vocab! W, N — they unlock everything! 🚀
character_tips.klavochka: You're amazing! Now you have "we", "now", "when" — real words! 💖
